local_dependency: Hugging Face model access for stabilityai/stable-fast-3d
known_risks: Model weights, Hugging Face tokens, virtual environments, cached ONNX files, and generated GLB/OBJ/FBX/STL outputs must not be committed to GitHub.
GPU and texture-baking compatibility require local manual validation and are not verified by the public probe.
The Gradio app can consume about 6 GB VRAM at 512 texture resolution and may fail if other GPU-heavy applications are open.
next_steps: Keep the upstream installation outside this repository and pass its location through SF3D_ROOT.
Add a CreNexus MCP wrapper only after export paths, file hashing, and artifact cleanup are fully explicit.
Record GLB dimensions, file size, and SHA256 when generated assets are used as evidence.
